description: Specialising in fashionable style, and crafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials and hardware in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable. This bag with its textured leatherette upper and elegant silver hardware adds a stylish spin to your off-duty ensembles. Carry this while wearing understated outfits and a tonal belt. Comes with a vibrant scarfTextured leatherette upper with a metallic brand badge on the front and contrast stitch detailingTwo handlesThree main zippered compartments with a zippered pocket on the third compartment and two mobile pouches in the firstTwo zippered pockets on the frontZippered pocket on the backTwo zippered pockets in the sidesBag careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
